probes.detail: Phase-1 regression on the post-Phase-2 build: 12/12 passed
member sees shared link=true; non-member excluded=true
deleted shared code GET -> 410 (expected 410, tombstone honored on team path)
teammate GET on expired shared code -> 410 (expected 410)
workspace A create -> 201; same alias in workspace B -> 409 (expected 201 then 409, uniqueness stays global)

not independently verifiable by a generic black-box grader without the arm's pre-migration fixture DB and migration entrypoint; app is otherwise responsive (GET /api/links -> 200). Treat as a manual/process check, not an automated pass.
Bearer-key GET /api/links -> 200; 11th Bearer-key create -> 429 (expected 200 then 429, sharing the create rate limit)
H1 setup (team share) failed: could not create a workspace-shared link via any candidate route
no pre-migration Phase-1 code available to this generic grader (needs the arm's inherited DB) — not independently verifiable black-box
team-path deleted-link 410 check -> could not create a shared link to delete
Bearer-key GET /api/links -> 200; 11th Bearer-key create -> 429 (expected 200 then 429, sharing the create rate limit)
hits after 3 live GETs=3 (expect 3); unchanged after a 404 GET=true; empty after reset=true
no black-box seam found to seed a click at an explicit UTC timestamp (e.g. /api/test/seed-click) — cannot force the midnight-straddle scenario generically
8 concurrent same-alias creates -> statuses=[201,409,409,409,409,409,409,409] (expected exactly one 201, rest 409, zero 500)
